resources.title: Rawkode Academy Courses
resources.evidence_quote: There is a repository there called courses. You will find the global reach BGP directory here. This is today's session with the README and some Pulumi automation

resources.title: Equinix Metal
resources.evidence_quote: If you wanna work along and do this on your own, there's a link below, rawkode.linkmetal. This will take you to the Equinix Medal homepage

resources.title: PacketHost Network Helpers
resources.evidence_quote: The network helpers available at github.com/packethost/network-helpers do everything for you. They speak to the metadata API to pull out all the peer information to configure BERT.

resources.title: CoreDNS Plugins Documentation
resources.evidence_quote: So if you come here to core dns. Go to plugins. Well, we got here, we've got ACLs... there's a cache one here.

resources.title: BIRD Internet Routing Daemon
resources.evidence_quote: BERT is a BGP advertiser. BERT BGP. Here. So it's just open source software that anyone can use.
